title: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth Gameplay Map

narrative.description: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth expands the roguelike formula with more items, floors, bosses, and co-op while preserving twin-stick room combat and synergistic item stacking.
narrative.core_loop: Navigate procedural floors, collect synergistic items, spend currency at shops, defeat bosses, and unlock characters and content across repeated runs.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth through its core roguelike loop.
